```
raises

```

classes.name: lib.idds.client.catalogclient.CatalogClient

methods.name: lib.idds.client.catalogclient.CatalogClient.__init__
documentation:
Constructor of the BaseRestClient.

```
param host

the address of the IDDS server.

param client_proxy

the client certificate proxy.

param timeout

timeout in seconds.
```

methods.name: lib.idds.client.catalogclient.CatalogClient.get_collections
documentation:
Get collections from the Head service.

```
param request_id

the request id.

param transform_id

the transform id.

param workload_id

the workload id.

param scope

the collection scope.

param name

the collection name, can be wildcard.

param relation_type

The relation_type of the request (input/output/log).
```

\:raise exceptions if it's not got successfully.

methods.name: lib.idds.client.catalogclient.CatalogClient.get_contents
documentation:
Get contents from the Head service.

```
param request_id

the request id.

param transform_id

the transform id.

param workload_id

the workload id.

param coll_scope

the collection scope.

param coll_name

the collection name, can be wildcard.

param relation_type

the relation between the collection and the transform(input, output, log)

param status

The content status.
```

\:raise exceptions if it's not got successfully.

methods.name: lib.idds.client.catalogclient.CatalogClient.get_match_contents
documentation:
Get contents from the Head service.

```
param coll_scope

the collection scope.

param coll_name

the collection name.

param scope

the content scope.

param name

the content name.

param min_id

the content min_id.

param max_id

the content max_id.

param request_id

the request id.

param workload_id

the workload id.

param only_return_best_match

only return the best match content if True.
```

\:raise exceptions if it's not got successfully.

methods.name: lib.idds.client.catalogclient.CatalogClient.register_contents
documentation:
register contents..

```
param coll_scope

the collection scope.

param coll_name

the collection name, can be wildcard.

param request_id

the request id.

param workload_id

the workload id.

param contents

list of contents.
```

\:raise exceptions if errors.

methods.name: lib.idds.client.catalogclient.CatalogClient.get_contents_output_ext
documentation:
Get output extension contents from the Head service.

```
param request_id

the request id.

param workload_id

the workload id.

param transform_id

the transform id.
```

\:raise exceptions if it's not got successfully.

methods.name: lib.idds.client.clientmanager.ClientManager.get_contents_output_ext
documentation:
Get output extension contents from the Head service.

```
param request_id

the request id.

param workload_id

the workload id.

param transform_id

the transform id.
```

\:raise exceptions if it's not got successfully.

methods.name: lib.idds.client.clientmanager.ClientManager.update_build_request
documentation:
Update Build Request to the Head service.

```
param request_id

the request.

param signature

the signature of the request.

param workflow

the workflow of the request.
```

\:raise exceptions if it's not updated successfully.
